creator: philipp.kloke@web.de
text:
The link to the Subversion project on https://www.freebsd.org/developers/cvs.html points to its former home page (http://subversion.tigris.org/), not to the current one (http://subversion.apache.org/).

As a side note, it would be convenient to have links to the actual repositories on that site, not only to the web interface.
